prompt: Bihar ke ek chhote se gao mein ek aisi purani haveli hai, jiska darwaza pichle do sau saalon se band hai. Gao ke log kehte hain ki us darwaze ke peeche kisi aam insaan ki nahi, balki ek purane samay ke tantrik ki rooh kaid hai. Ek raat, teen dost himmat karke us haveli ke andar jaate hain. Jaise hi raat ke theek barah bajte hain, wo bhari aur purana lohe ka darwaza apne aap dheere-dheere khulne lagta hai. Andar se ek aisi thandi hawa aati hai jo unka khoon jama deti hai. Unhe ek ajeeb si ghanti ki aawaz sunai deti hai, aur deewaron par unki khud ki parchhaiyan unse alag hokar chalne lagti hain. Wo darr ke maare bhaagne ki koshish karte hain, lekin haveli ka mukhya darwaza gayab ho chuka hota hai. Andhere se ek bhayanak aawaz goonjti hai—"Tumne mujhe aazad kar diya."

Ek din usne apne dada se pucha,
“Main har baar ruk kyun jaata hoon?”

Dada ne ek glass paani diya aur bola,
“Isse bahar phenko.”

Ladke ne phenk diya.

Phir dada ne wahi glass dobara bhar ke diya aur bola,
“Ab is baar sirf 1 boond kam chhodna.”

Ladka hasa aur bola, “Isse kya farq padega?”

Dada bole,
“Zindagi mein log 99% tak pahunch jaate hain… par jeet us 1% mein hoti hai jo log complete karte hain.”

Us din se ladke ne rule bana liya — jo start karunga, finish karunga.

Ek din usne apne dada se pucha,
“Main har baar ruk kyun jaata hoon?”

Dada ne ek glass paani diya aur bola,
“Isse bahar phenko.”

Ladke ne phenk diya.

Phir dada ne wahi glass dobara bhar ke diya aur bola,

Ladka hasa aur bola, “Isse kya farq padega?”

Dada bole,
“Zindagi mein log 99% tak pahunch jaate hain… par jeet us 1% mein hoti hai jo log complete karte hain.”

Us din se ladke ne rule bana liya — jo start karunga, finish karunga.

Ek gaon mein ek ladka rehta tha. Uske papa ne use ek purani ghadi di aur bola,
“Isse sambhal ke rakhna.”

Ladke ne ghadi dekhi aur socha — yeh toh purani aur bekaar hai.

Ek din woh ghadi bechne bazaar gaya. Dukaan wale ne bola,
“100 rupaye.”

Phir woh ek purani cheezon ke collector ke paas gaya. Collector bola,
“10,000 rupaye.”

Ladka hairaan ho gaya aur ghar laut aaya.

Papa muskura kar bole,
“Dekha? Ek hi ghadi thi… par jagah badli toh keemat badal gayi.”

“Zindagi mein agar koi tumhari value na samjhe, iska matlab yeh nahi ki tum kam ho. Ho sakta hai tum galat jagah par ho.”

Ek kisan ke paas do beej the.

Pehla beej bola,
“Main zameen ke andar nahi jaunga. Andhera hoga, mushkil hogi.”

Dusra bola,
“Main koshish karunga.”

Kisan ne dono ko alag rakha.

Jo beej dara hua tha, woh waise hi pada raha aur kuch din baad sukha gaya.

Jo beej mitti mein gaya, usne andhera dekha, paani saha, waqt laga… aur kuch mahino baad ek bada ped ban gaya.

Ek din hawa chali, log us ped ki chhaon mein baithe.

Ped muskuraya aur bola,
“Jo andhere se dara nahi, wahi roshni tak pahucha.”

Ek chhota ladka roz school paidal jaata tha. Ek din usne raste mein dekha ek budhe aadmi ke kuch sikke gir gaye.

Ladka chahta toh paise rakh sakta tha, kyunki uski apni jeb bhi khali thi.

Par usne daud kar sab sikke uthaaye aur budhe aadmi ko de diye.

Budhe aadmi ne pucha,
“Beta, tumne apne paas kyun nahi rakhe?”

Ladka bola,
“Paise se jeb bhar jaati hai… par galat kaam se dil halka ho jaata hai.”

Budhe aadmi muskuraaye aur bole,
“Tumne paise nahi, apni aadat bachayi hai.”

Kuch din baad wahi aadmi us school ka trustee nikla aur us ladke ki padhai ka kharcha utha liya.

Moral: Sahi kaam ka fayda hamesha turant nahi dikhta, par bekaar bhi nahi jaata. ✨

He is playing an intricately carved golden bansuri (flute). Clad in glowing yellow silk dhoti (Pitambara) with heavy, detailed ancient Indian jewelry. In the background, a peaceful Yamuna river, soft sun rays piercing through sacred trees, a gentle cow standing nearby, and glowing particles in the air. Supermarkets are secretly controlling your brain. Notice how the most expensive items are always at eye level? It is called the 'Bullseye Zone'. They put the cheap products at the very bottom so you rarely look there. Next time you go shopping, look down to save your money. Ek chhota ladka tha jo drawing bahut pasand karta tha. Ek din school mein uski favourite pencil toot gayi.

Woh udaas hokar bola,
“Ab meri drawing achhi nahi banegi…”

Uske teacher ne usse ek purani si chhoti pencil di aur bole,
“Try karo.”

Ladka hairaan tha — itni chhoti pencil se kya hoga?

Phir bhi usne drawing banana shuru ki. Dheere dheere usne apni sabse achhi drawing bana di.

Teacher muskura kar bole,
“Achhi cheezein hamesha bade tools se nahi banti… kabhi kabhi himmat aur koshish hi kaafi hoti hai.”

Ladka pencil ko dekh kar hasa aur samajh gaya.

Moral: Jo tumhare paas hai, kabhi kabhi wahi kaafi hota hai sapne poore karne ke liye

Raat ke 9 baje the. Baarish halki halki ho rahi thi. Ek ladka apni naukri ke interview se udaas hokar bus stop par baitha tha.

Usne poora din mehnat ki thi… par interview clear nahi hua.

Woh dheere se bola,
“Shayad main kisi kaam ka nahi…”

Tabhi usne dekha ek budhe uncle bus stop ke kone mein khade the aur baarish un par gir rahi thi.

Ladka khud udaas tha, phir bhi usne apni chhoti si chhatri unhe de di aur bola,
“Uncle, aap le lijiye.”

Uncle muskura diye aur bas itna bole,
“Beta, har haar ka matlab rukna nahi hota.”

Bus aa gayi. Dono alag ho gaye.

Do din baad ladke ko ek unknown number se call aaya.

Phone par awaaz aayi,
“Kal office aa sakte ho?”

Ladka hairaan ho gaya.

Office pahunchne par usne dekha — wahi budhe uncle saamne baithe the.

Uncle bole,
“Interview wale din main wahan tha. Tum select nahi hue the. Par bus stop par maine dekha… jab tum khud pareshaan the tab bhi tumne kisi aur ki madad ki.”

Ladka chup ho gaya.

Uncle bole,
“Skills sikhayi ja sakti hain… par insaaniyat mushkil se milti hai.”

Us din ladke ko naukri mil gayi.

Office se bahar nikalte waqt baarish phir ho rahi thi… lekin is baar uske chehre par muskaan thi.

Moral: Kabhi kabhi zindagi tumhe test interview room mein nahi… chhote lamhon mein deti hai.

“Band Darwaza” 🚪✨

Ek chhota sa gaon tha. Wahan ek purana ghar tha jiska ek kamra hamesha band rehta tha.

Log bolte the,
“Us darwaze ke peeche kuch raaz hai.”

Gaon ka ek ladka tha — Aarav. Use bachpan se curiosity thi.

Ek din usne himmat ki aur purane ghar mein ghus gaya.

Andar sab dhool se bhara tha. Aur saamne wahi band darwaza.

Usne dheere se darwaza khola…

Andar na sona tha, na koi khazana.

Bas ek purani kursi, ek meja aur ek diary.

Diary par likha tha:

“Jo yahan tak pahunch gaya, uske liye ek baat…”

Aarav ne diary kholi.

Andar sirf ek line likhi thi—

“Log aksar darwaze se darte hain… par zindagi ke sabse bade khazane dar ke us paar milte hain.”

Aarav chup ho gaya.

Usne diary band ki aur ghar se bahar nikla.

Us din ke baad usne har woh kaam karna shuru kiya jisse woh darta tha — logon se baat karna, naye kaam try karna, sapne dekhna.

Kuch saalon baad log usse poochne lage—

“Tum itna badal kaise gaye?”

Aarav bas muskura kar bolta—

“Maine ek darwaza khola tha.”

Moral: Kabhi kabhi sabse bada khazana kisi jagah par nahi… apne dar ke us paar hota hai. ✨

Ek ladka tha — roz busy rehta tha. Doston ke messages ignore karta, ghar walon se kam baat karta.

Ek din uske phone par ek unknown number se message aaya:

“Jo zaroori hai, uske liye waqt nikaal lo.”

Usne socha kisi ka prank hoga.

Agla din phir wahi message aaya.

Phir teesre din.

Ab usne gusse mein reply kiya,
“Kaun ho tum?”

Kuch der baad jawab aaya—

“Main woh hoon jise tum roz kal par taal dete ho.”

Woh samjha nahi.

Usne call kiya… number exist hi nahi karta tha.

Us raat woh ghar aaya aur bahut dino baad maa ke saath baith kar khana khaya.

Purane dost ko call kiya.

Papa se baat ki.

Aur usse ehsaas hua—

Kabhi kabhi hum zindagi ki sabse important cheezein isliye kho dete hain kyunki hume lagta hai ki abhi bahut time hai.

Us din ke baad usne ek rule bana liya—

Jo important hai, usse aaj hi waqt do.

Moral: Har cheez kal tak ruk sakti hai… par har rishta nahi. ✨
Loed  ganesha  8k ultra
